zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Grosvenor於大約1435年出生在英國英格蘭時，她的父親Ralph Grosvenor29歲，母親Joan Fitton37歲。她於大約1464年與Richard Winnington I在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1506年8月22日在她的家鄉享年72歲。

nameMeanings.name: Grosvenor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from French gros ‘big, great’ + veneur ‘hunter’.

History: This is the name of one of the wealthiest families in Britain, which holds the title Duke of Westminster. They have been long established in Cheshire, with strong links with the city of Chester. One of the earliest recorded bearers of the name was Robert le Grosvenor of Budworth, who was granted lands by the Earl of Chester in 1160. The family's fortunes were founded by Thomas Grosvenor (born 1656), who in 1677 married an heiress, Mary Davies, whose inheritance included Ebury Farm, Middlesex. This now forms an area of central London that includes Grosvenor Square and Belgrave Square.

variants.name: Gravenor
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French grand ‘big, tall’ + veneor ‘hunter’. Compare Grosvenor .

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Grosvenor was born about 1435, in England, United Kingdom, her father, Ralph Grosvenor, was 29 and her mother, Joan Fitton, was 37. She married Richard Winnington I about 1464, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 22 August 1506, in her hometown, at the age of 72.

Elle a épousé Richard Winnington I environ 1464, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 août 1506, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 72 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Grosvenor(이)가 대략 1435년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Grosvenor(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Fitton(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 대략 1464년 영국에서 Richard Winnington I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1506년 8월 22일 그녀의 고향에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Grosvenor родилась около 1435 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ralph Grosvenor было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Fitton, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Winnington I около 1464 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 22 августа 1506 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 72 лет.
